title: Using General Custer to find "half way" date - Errors
excerpt:
I need to find the in between (half way) date between “Start Date” and “Est End Date”. Here is the formula I am using, but I get an error. 
DATEADD({{client’s Start Date}}, ROUND(DATEDIF({{client’s Start Date}}, {{client…

posts.author: lolsCTC (Lonni)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to find the in between (half way) date between “Start Date” and “Est End Date”. Here is the formula I am using, but I get an error.

DATEADD({{client’s Start Date}}, ROUND(DATEDIF({{client’s Start Date}}, {{client’s Est End Date}}, “days”) / 2), “days”)

The error is: General Caster Formula Error: Wrong number of arguments for ROUND() function: 1 given, 2 expected

TIA for the help!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Try this one “ADD_DAYS({Start Date}, ROUND(DAYS({End Date}, {Start Date}) / 2, 0))”

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: lolsCTC (Lonni)
posts.cookedHtml: This gives me: General Caster Formula Error: Unexpected ,
